ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost */,
  "total_ties" INTEGER /* Total number of games tied */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of games won */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offensive_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offensive metric record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "scrimmage_plays" TEXT /* Total scrimmage plays */,
  "yards_per_game" REAL /* Average yards gained per game */,
  "yards_per_play" REAL /* Average yards gained per play */,
  "first_downs_per_game" REAL /* Average first downs per game */,
  "third_down_made" INTEGER /* Number of successful third down plays */,
  "third_down_attempts" INTEGER /* Total third down attempts */,
  "third_down_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful third down plays */,
  "fourth_down_made" INTEGER /* Number of successful fourth down plays */,
  "fourth_down_attempts" INTEGER /* Total fourth down attempts */,
  "fourth_down_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful fourth down plays */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total penalty yards */,
  "time_of_possession_per_game" TEXT /* Average time of possession per game */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  "passing_yards_per_game" REAL /* Average passing yards gained per game */,
  "rushing_yards_per_game" REAL /* Average rushing yards gained per game */,
  "pass_completions" INTEGER /* Total number of completed passes */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of pass attempts */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of passes completed */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of times the quarterback was sacked */,
  "sack_yards_lost" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to sacks */,
  "touchdowns_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of touchdowns scored */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of field goal attempts */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals made */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of punt returns */,
  "punt_return_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained from punt returns */,
  "kickoff_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of kickoff returns */,
  "kickoff_return_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained from kickoff returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
